failures.description: The agent invoked ProductCatalogSearch with an invalid schema: product_id was an integer 0 and item_id was omitted, so the tool rejected the request before any product evidence could be retrieved.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked whether item 1151293680 of Mechanical Keyboard has backlight=RGB. The agent had enough information to call the catalog tool with the item identifier, but the Researcher prepared a malformed call using {"product_id": 0}: the product_id value is the wrong type/value and the required string item_id is missing. The next step confirms this with a SchemaError from the tool. This is not a connectivity, guardrail, or unsupported-capability issue.
